segments.text: I will lift up my eyes to the hills.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: From where does my help come?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: I will…: or, Shall I lift up mine eyes to the hills? whence should my help come?

segments.text: My help comes from the LORD, who made heaven and earth.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He will not let your foot be moved; he who keeps you will not slumber.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Behold, he who keeps Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The LORD is your keeper; the LORD is your shade on your right hand.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The sun shall not strike you by day, nor the moon by night.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The LORD will keep you from all evil; he will keep your life.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The LORD will keep your going out and your coming in from this time forth and forevermore.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
